entry.name: OverlayPosition
entry.label: Position of overlay (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right)

entry.name: RetryRequestCount
entry.label: How many times to retry request when it fails

entry.name: RetryRequestDelay
entry.label: How much time in seconds between request retries

entry.name: RefetchSignal
entry.label: Signal to trigger refetch from config page

entry.name: lastValidImagePath
entry.label: Path to the last valid loaded image

entry.name: LastCopyrightText
entry.label: Full copyright text from last loaded image

entry.name: LastCopyrightLink
entry.label: Copyright link from last loaded image

entry.name: LastTitle
entry.label: Title from the image provider response

entry.name: LastDescription
entry.label: Description parsed from the copyright text (before parentheses)

entry.name: LastParsedCopyright
entry.label: Copyright holder parsed from the copyright text (inside parentheses)

entry.name: CachedResponse
entry.label: Cached API response from config preview

entry.name: LastFetchDate
entry.label: Date of the last successful wallpaper fetch (YYYY-MM-DD)
